data.body: CLAIMED epic jira-reb-977 + story 6fe2 (both in_progress, assignee joeoakhart) after r7 PASS with matching fingerprints. Convergence path worked: fix plan fabrications -> file_impact grounding stabilizes -> PASS signs matching fp -> claim. 6fe2 plan defects remediated across rounds: (r3) Jira-seam scope contradiction, (r5) AC6 -k projections global-filter verify defect, (r6/r7) JIRA_BIND fabricated event type. Now entering Phase 4 held-out TDD for 6fe2. Oracle selectors: cli, mcp, python, invalid, legacy, immutable, projections. Held-out plan: give implementer recorded-channel happy path (cli/mcp/python + helper matrix); hold out invalid/legacy/immutable/projections edge+contract tests.
